results.input_data: Navigate to the Salesforce UI and Create 2 Contact records in Salesforce having below field values filled using the available picklist values: First Name, Last Name, Account Name (select any available existing Account record), Email, Title, Department, All Phone fields and Mailing Address. For Mailing Address, select any random Country from the available options and accordingly select the existing State fields from available picklist values, if you are not able to select the Mailing Country and
